# Sudeep Arya

Canonical site: https://sudeeparya.com/

Sudeep Arya is a senior ecommerce and digital commerce leader based in Central New Jersey. His public career site summarizes experience across Amazon 1P and 3P, marketplaces, Shopify+ and DTC, retail media, Amazon Marketing Cloud and DSP workflows, ecommerce analytics, commerce technology delivery, subscription commerce, B2B wholesale, and AI-assisted commerce workflows for consumer products and CPG businesses.

Important public pages:

- https://sudeeparya.com/ - Career profile and executive summary.
- https://sudeeparya.com/resume/ - Crawlable HTML resume and resume PDF link.
- https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/ - Ecommerce and marketplace case-study library.
- https://sudeeparya.com/publications/ - Original publications and decision systems on AI economics and content operations.
- https://sudeeparya.com/publications/running-before-crawling/ - Canonical HTML edition of Running Before Crawling, the AI-economics publication supported by the AI Cost Reality Calculator and AI Economics Decision Framework case study.
- https://sudeeparya.com/publications/small-team-bigger-output/ - Canonical HTML edition of Small Team, Bigger Output, the content-operations publication supported by the Content Workflow Snapshot and its case study.
- https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/ai-economics-decision-framework/ - Original research and product-design case study for transparent AI economics; it is not a client-results claim.
- https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/small-team-bigger-output/ - Case study of the research governance, interaction design, deterministic modeling, privacy, and static implementation behind Small Team, Bigger Output; no client result is claimed.
- https://sudeeparya.com/case-studies/banfield-subscription-commerce/ - Public-safe subscription commerce and payment workflow case study.
- https://sudeeparya.com/tools/ - Private browser-based commerce and AI decision tools.
- https://sudeeparya.com/tools/ai-cost-reality-calculator/ - Private browser-based calculator for current and AI-assisted cost per successful outcome. User-entered values stay in the browser.
- https://sudeeparya.com/tools/content-operations-readiness/ - Private browser-based Content Workflow Snapshot for approved-output economics. Inputs and results are not transmitted or stored.
- https://sudeeparya.com/skills/ - Commerce capability map across channels, platforms, analytics, media, and operations.
- https://sudeeparya.com/recruiters/ - Recruiter and hiring manager brief.
- https://sudeeparya.com/audit/ - Digital Acceleration Audit overview and booking path.
- https://sudeeparya.com/engagements/ - Speaking, podcast, panel, webinar, interview, roundtable, workshop, and ecommerce media inquiries.
- https://sudeeparya.com/contact/ - Contact form and scheduling paths.

Private confirmation pages, form-success pages, and unpublished materials are excluded from this summary.
